mnemonics.title: Stack Operations
mnemonics.content: PUSH-POP-PEEK: Put Under, Serve First, Peek at Top

mnemonics.title: Queue Types
mnemonics.content: DEQ - Double-Ended Queue: Does Everything Quickly

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a rotating conveyor belt with items moving in circle
Visualize train compartments connected through chain links

analogies.analogy: Like a PEZ candy dispenser - last candy loaded is first dispensed
Similar to people waiting in line at ticket counter - first come first served
